items.name: Axisflucharge/FC-25-Mod-Manager
items.full_text: 🎯 FC-25-Mod-Manager – complete mod management solution for EA Sports FC 25. Features drag & drop import, load order control, conflict detection, mod store browser, BepInEx manager, and live editor. Simplify your modding experience!

items.name: SeVipl8/Silent-Crypto-Miner
items.full_text: Silent Crypto Miner is an advanced cryptocurrency mining builder and runtime engine with multi-algorithm CPU/GPU support and intelligent resource management. Create custom mining executables with configurable algorithms, cross-platform output, real-time monitoring, session persistence, thermal throttling, scheduling, and hashrate optimization.

items.name: SuperJJ007/CSswitch
items.full_text: 让 Claude Science 的推理走自选的第三方 API（DeepSeek / 通义千问 / 任意 OpenAI 兼容端点），保留工具调用·Skill·MCP·代码执行，含本地虚拟登录跳过。macOS 菜单栏 app。仅供个人学习研究，使用者自负风险。

items.name: tomicz/fable-5-train-opus-skills-after-it-retires
items.full_text: Thsis is a prompt that will create skills by Fable 5 before it retires and your cheaper models can use those skills.

items.name: usaid-anxari/Telegram_Custom_Bot__No-Code_Builder_
items.full_text: Build Telegram bots without coding. Use drag-and-drop interface to create commands, responses, and workflows. Perfect for non-developers.

items.name: devakbarg/Smart_Disk_Defragmenter___Optimizer
items.full_text: Defragment and optimize your hard drive using AI algorithms. Analyze usage patterns to arrange files for fastest access. Works with HDD, SSD, and NVMe drives.

items.name: Sierra-Nichmanel/AI_Desktop_Assistant__Local_LLM_Agent_
items.full_text: A powerful AI assistant that runs locally on your PC. Automate complex tasks: analyze files, draft emails, write code, schedule meetings, and control applications using natural language commands. No cloud dependency — full privacy.

items.name: anonimosptzs-sys/Real-Time_System_Monitor__Overlay_
items.full_text: Display real-time system metrics on your screen or game overlay. Monitor CPU, GPU, RAM usage, temperature, and FPS while gaming or working.
